summary: Tested Collection Manager Bulk Description removal and Bulk Category Editor Collection Page Description addition. All tests PASSED. Collection Manager no longer has Bulk Description button or selection mode. Bulk Category Editor now has Collection Page Description section with textarea, Save, and Clear buttons. Backend API correctly saves and returns custom_description.
critical_code_review_comments: CollectionManager.jsx correctly reverted to simple card-only layout without selection mode or bulk description
SupplierProducts.js lines 385-390 correctly define collection description state variables
SupplierProducts.js lines 2284-2336 correctly implement saveCollectionPageDescription function with PUT to /api/website-admin/collections/{series_name}
SupplierProducts.js lines 2339-2364 correctly implement loadCollectionDescription to auto-load existing description when modal opens
SupplierProducts.js lines 10742-10813 correctly render Collection Page Description UI section with textarea, Save, and Clear buttons
All data-testid attributes present: collection-page-description-section, collection-page-description-textarea, save-collection-description-btn, clear-collection-description-btn

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 4 collection description API tests passed
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements present and functional

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Canopy supplier products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Collection Manager Bulk Description REMOVED: No longer has 'Bulk Description' button, selection mode, or bulk description panel. Collection Page Description ADDED to Bulk Category Editor: Located in SupplierProducts.js, accessible via admin/supplier-products > select products > Edit Categories. The section appears after 'Apply Description to X Products' button. Features: textarea for custom description, 'Save Collection Description' button (calls PUT /api/website-admin/collections/{series_name}), 'Clear' button. Auto-loads existing custom_description when modal opens.

1_collection_manager_no_bulk_description.details: Collection Manager toolbar does NOT have 'Bulk Description' button

2_collection_manager_no_selection_mode.details: Collection Manager has NO selection checkboxes - cards work normally with Featured/Hidden/Upload/ShowDetails only

3_collection_manager_normal_buttons_pres.details: Grid, Reorder, Card Settings, Refresh buttons all present and functional

4_bulk_category_editor_opens.details: Bulk Category Editor modal opens when selecting products and clicking 'Edit Categories'

5_collection_page_description_section_pr.details: Collection Page Description section found with data-testid='collection-page-description-section'

7_save_collection_description_button_pre.details: Save Collection Description button found with data-testid='save-collection-description-btn'

8_clear_button_present.details: Clear button found with data-testid='clear-collection-description-btn' (only visible when description is not empty)

9_save_collection_description_api_call.details: Save button calls PUT /api/website-admin/collections/{series_name} with custom_description - success toast: 'Collection description saved for 49 collections'

10_clear_button_functionality.details: Clear button clears textarea and sends empty custom_description to API

11_backend_get_collections_returns_custo.details: GET /api/website-admin/collections returns custom_description field for collections
